description: You are a design engineer implementing an Engineering Change Order (ECO). Update the instrument mounting plate CAD file (/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/plate_rev_a.slvs) by identifying and correcting the three obsolete REV-A dimensional constraints using the REV-B values specified in the ECO document on the desktop. Save the updated file as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/plate_rev_b.slvs, ensuring the other three constraints remain unchanged.

metadata.domain: Instrument / enclosure design / engineering change control
